visualGoal: Make a new pilot confident they can buy a real magnetic-sensor HOSAS for under $300 a pair, then decide the trade cleanly: vibration-and-value now (WinWing) vs the upgrade ladder later (VKB). Real product proof throughout on the VKB side; WinWing held text-only until a verified photo exists. No procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: WinWing Ursa Minor Space Joystick (L and R)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Headline product in this comparison but has NO verified in-house photo, so it is text-only throughout the body. Needs a real, vision-verified product photo of the Space (twist) variant before it can appear in the shotgrid, as a gearpick, or before certification. This is the primary certification blocker.
Mentioned only in the photo-verification note as the WinWing upgrade destination. Low priority; kept text-only. Source a real photo if a future guide features the WinWing ladder.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic clean desk space-sim battlestation at cool cyan-and-amber rim light, a HOSAS twin-stick mounting zone with two open Monstertech clamp mounts left empty for real product overlays, curator Val Chen mid-gesture weighing two options, cable labels visible, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake joystick, warped grips, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art, invented WinWing stick

infographicPrompts.title: The sub-$120 space stick trade
content: Both clear the bar: magnetic sensors + twist
WinWing Ursa Minor: vibration + cheaper pair TODAY
VKB Gladiator: metal gimbal + lockable twist + LADDER
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, cyan/amber space palette, verified VKB Gladiator photo as one row marker, WinWing row uses a text/silhouette placeholder until a verified photo exists

infographicPrompts.title: Budget HOSAS buy order
content: 1 Confirm two sticks is your layout
2 Pick your side: vibration now vs ladder later
6 Budget an evening for config software
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays (VKB Gladiator, Monstertech, Stream Deck verified; WinWing placeholder only)

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen at a clean twin-stick desk cockpit, one hand resting on a mounted joystick, thoughtful buy-advice energy, product overlay space beside the free hand, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Source and vision-verify a real WinWing Ursa Minor Space product photo so it can move from text-only to a shotgrid/gearpick visual — the single item blocking certification.

Confirm exact current US per-stick price for the WinWing Ursa Minor Space (triangulated to ~$110-115) and for the VKB Gladiator Space Combat Edition (~$119 Standard / ~$139 Premium) before any hard-price certification.
Decide whether to build a /space/gear/winwing-ursa-minor-space spec-card page once a verified image exists (product exists in space.json but with an unverified image path).
